children.text: NB¹ is a supplement subscription built from your biology, not someone else’s average. We sequence your gut microbiome from a sample at home, then build and ship your daily protocol every month.

layout.formFootNote: Reserve to lock launch pricing and ship in the first batch.
layout.successMessage: You’re on the list. Your kit ships two weeks before public launch.
layout.outcomesFooter: Backed by your retest data — every cycle.

steps.panelBody: A free shotgun-metagenomic kit ships within 48 hours. A two-minute stool sample reads the full DNA of every organism in your gut — species and strain level, not the genus-level estimate most consumer tests give you.

Your sample is sequenced and read against 8,069 reference metagenomes. We don’t return a species list — we return six functional teams, four metabolic ratios, and the gaps your formula needs to address.
Up to seven units, blister-packed for morning and evening. Every ingredient, every dose, every exclusion is a decision tied to your data. Nothing produced until everything is known.

children.text: From your kit. To your data. To

layout.headingLine1: more genetic material than your DNA.

outcomeCards.backBody: Less bloating. Better regularity. The species causing your discomfort, addressed specifically — not a generic probiotic.
Stress markers acknowledged in your formula. Adaptogens chosen from your data, not guesswork. Days feel less reactive.
No 3pm crash. The mitochondrial cofactors and B-vitamins your biology actually needs — at the doses your data calls for.
Skin, immune, recovery — the systems your gut barrier supports. As your microbiome rebuilds, the rest follows.

layout.subText: Real outcomes, not promises. Every cycle, we re-sequence your biology, rebuild your formula, and show you exactly what shifted — across sleep, energy, digestion, mood, and recovery. Markers, not guesses.

layout.subtext: Two cycles, eight months apart. Same person, re-sequenced, re-formulated. Some things resolved. Some new things showed up. The formula tracked all of it.
layout.cycle1Footer: 3 of 6 teams flagged. Protocol targets the gaps.
layout.cycle2Footer: Same protocol size. Different composition. Your biology moved.

children.text: The same as a premium greens powder.
Built from your biology, not someone else’s average.

members.name: Polina Novikova
members.meta: PhD Bioinformatics · University of Luxembourg · Microbiome & Multi-Omics

children.text: Polina leads the science behind NB1’s personalised supplementation product — from microbiome analysis and metabolic modelling to the algorithm that maps individual gut data into a precise, clinically grounded protocol. She holds a PhD in Bioinformatics from the University of Luxembourg (2020–2024) and an MS in Integrated Systems Biology. Her doctoral research built computational workflows using graphs, time series models, and deep learning to identify patterns in gut microbiome and multi-omics data.

members.name: Prof. Dr. Dirk Haller
members.meta: ZIEL Institute Director · UEG Research Prize winner

children.text: Prof. Haller holds the Chair of Nutrition and Immunology at TU Munich and directs the ZIEL Institute for Food & Health. His research focuses on how the gut microbiome influences chronic disease susceptibility and how diet shapes microbial communities at the molecular level. He has been recognised with the distinguished €100,000 United European Gastroenterology Research Prize.

Prof. Venema is one of Europe’s most cited microbiome researchers, with 25 years of experience and 254 publications with more than 17,000 citations. Founder and CEO of Beneficial Microbes Consultancy, and editor-in-chief of the journal Beneficial Microbes.

The algorithm — built by six researchers from TU Munich, Wageningen, Luxembourg, and Zurich — turns your diagnostic into a draft. A qualified nutritionist on the board then reads it, validates it against your data, and signs off. Only then does it get manufactured.
